Typed KeaControlError per boundary: SocketMissing / ConnectionRefused / Timeout / Io / MalformedResponse / UnsupportedCommand (Kea result 2) / KeaResult (other non-zero).

Real Kea behind NQ_KEA_CTRL_SOCKET + --ignored.
